name: Moksh Garg
personal_note: Love how Figr thinks through UX before designing — the product-aware approach backed by 200K+ UX patterns is really smart
dm_text:
Hey Moksh! Just came across Figr AI on Product Hunt — Love how Figr thinks through UX before designing — the product-aware approach backed by 200K+ UX patterns is really smart.

Quick question: how are you currently handling customer feedback as you scale?

I built Rereflect (rereflect.ca) — it uses AI to auto-categorize feedback into pain points, feature requests, and churn risk alerts.

Happy to give you 3 months of Pro free if you'd try it and share honest feedback. No strings attached.
notes: Raised $2.25M seed (Kalaari + Antler). Bengaluru-based. Google Startups Accelerator. Launched on PH + Show HN. Co-founded with Chirag Singla (ML engineer).

name: Sara Landfors
personal_note: Interesting approach with extraction-first AI for complex docs — the focus on structured, traceable insights instead of chat-based summaries is a great differentiator
dm_text:
Hey Sara! Just came across Normain on Product Hunt — Interesting approach with extraction-first AI for complex docs — the focus on structured, traceable insights instead of chat-based summaries is a great differentiator.

Quick question: how are you currently handling customer feedback as you scale?

I built Rereflect (rereflect.ca) — it uses AI to auto-categorize feedback into pain points, feature requests, and churn risk alerts.

Happy to give you 3 months of Pro free if you'd try it and share honest feedback. No strings attached.
notes: Stanford engineering degree. Ex-BCG X data science + Validio (data observability, $15M raised). Raised 7 MSEK. Stockholm-based. Co-founded with Kalle Hansson and Dennis Landfors.

name: Mehdi Djabri
personal_note: The CRM + Slack + email integration is clever — connecting context across tools to write better email replies is a smart angle
dm_text:

name: Anya
personal_note: Going from messy CSVs to McKinsey-level insights is brilliant positioning — and the 3M users in China proves the concept scales
notes: Ex-quant analyst at Charles River Development (State Street). 3M users in China, expanding globally. PH Jan 2026 (224 upvotes). Offering free month promo through Feb 28. LinkedIn TBD — check PH page @anya_pandada or company page linkedin.com/company/pandada.

name: Laura Zeng
personal_note: Love the idea of turning repetitive workflows into AI playbooks that run themselves — great for freelancers and consultants
dm_text:
Hey Laura! Just came across Leapility on Product Hunt — Love the idea of turning repetitive workflows into AI playbooks that run themselves — great for freelancers and consultants.

Quick question: how are you currently handling customer feedback as you scale?

I built Rereflect (rereflect.ca) — it uses AI to auto-categorize feedback into pain points, feature requests, and churn risk alerts.

Happy to give you 3 months of Pro free if you'd try it and share honest feedback. No strings attached.
notes: PH launch got 462 upvotes. Running own promo (PH1MPRO 50% off Pro). Targets consultants, marketers, educators, freelancers. LinkedIn TBD — check PH page for profile link.
